title: Photosynthesis basics
text: Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy stored in glucose.

title: Water cycle
text: Water evaporates from oceans, condenses into clouds, and returns as precipitation.

title: Newton laws
text: An object in motion stays in motion unless acted upon by an external force.

title: DNA replication
text: DNA replication is the biological process of producing two identical copies of DNA.

title: Quantum entanglement
text: Two particles can become entangled such that measuring one immediately influences the other.
